resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def trailingZeroes(self, n: int) -> int:
        count = 0
        while n:
            n //= 5
            count += n
        return count
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Counts how many factors of 5 appear in n! by repeatedly dividing n by 5 and summing the quotients; each division represents the contribution of the next power of 5.
